name: hidden-chess
description: Play Hidden Chess — a chess variant where you design your own starting setup and your opponent can't see what your pieces are.

scripts.test: esbuild src/engine/engine.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=node_modules/.cache/engine.test.mjs && node node_modules/.cache/engine.test.mjs && esbuild src/game/p2p.test.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=node_modules/.cache/p2p.test.mjs && node node_modules/.cache/p2p.test.mjs
